_meta._divergence: langgraph-python chains the two tool legs of each pill by toolCallId; Strands mints UUID tool_call_ids and the probe runs 3 pills in ONE thread, so toolCallId and hasToolResult gating both break. Each pill's 2-tool chain is sequenced with a per-userMessage sequenceIndex counter (seq0 -> tool1, seq1 -> tool2, seq2 -> final content), id- and thread-history-invariant (same pattern as built-in-agent/frontend-tools). Reasoning rides the tool legs exactly as before.
